title: Deal Destination
description: A destination where a deal is activated (DSP or SSP). Used in activate_deal request.

platform_type.description: Decisioning platform type: DSP (buyer-side) or SSP (sell-side)

platform_name.description: Identifier or name of the platform (e.g. vendor name)

account_id.description: Account or seat ID on the destination platform

mode.description: CREATE_AND_SYNC: create physical deal if needed and sync. BIND_EXISTING: attach to existing physical deal ID.
